name: Red Beans with Pasta Sausage and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 large Swiss Chard leaves (red or green)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans in a pot with enough water to barely cover. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the beans are just tender, about 2 hours. Add water if needed to keep the beans covered.
2. Remove from heat, drain, and set aside.
3. Cut stems out of tomatoes and blanch in boiling water for 1 minute or until skins crack. Remove, peel, halve, and seed the tomatoes. If using canned tomatoes, halve and seed them. Halve again if needed.
4. Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente. Drain and mix with beans.
5. Prepare Swiss Chard by removing stems, chopping leaves, and slicing stems thinly. Set aside.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. In a Dutch oven over medium heat, heat oil. Add sausages and cook for 3 minutes until browned. Remove fat.
8. Add garlic and cook another minute.
9. Stir in tomatoes, beans, pasta mixture, oregano, stems, salt, and pepper. Pour into a baking dish.
10. Bake uncovered for 20 minutes.
11. Add chopped chard leaves and return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Serve hot with grated cheese on top.
